title: selaginella jugorum
intro: Selaginella jugorum, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of small, evergreen, terrestrial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. Selaginella jugorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
